docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT VILLALTA, SELOMI CROSS COMPLAINT DISMISSED PER CROSS COMPLAINANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VILLALTA, SELOMI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUINONES, FERNANDO $550.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $572.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CONTINUANCE REQUEST SUBMITTED. (FILED AT INSISTENCE OF DEFENDANT) HEARING 3-23-05. SENT TO COURT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-23-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-14-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON BASF'S FEE DISPUTE MEDIATION PROGRAM AND/OR FOR FURTHER TRIAL.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY VILLALTA, SELOMI AS TO DEFENDANT QUINONES, FERNANDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-02-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-23-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT QUINONES, FERNANDO

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-05-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-02-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT ON BASF'S FEE DISPUTE MEDIATION. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTINUED FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT ON STATUS OF BASF MEDIATION PROGRAM.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-02-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-11-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT HAD MADE NO EFFORT TO INITIATE THE ATTORNEY-CLIENT FEE DISPUTE PROGRAM'S MEDIATIOIN SERVICES PER REQUEST OF THE COURT.
NEW ADDRESS OF PLTF: P.O. BOX 11251 SAN RAFAEL, CA 94912
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,750.00 FILED BY QUINONES, FERNANDO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT VILLALTA, SELOMI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-14-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-05-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER PROGRESS RE PORT ON BASF'S FEE DISPUTE MEDIATION PROGRAM. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONT'D FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT ON STATUS OF BASF MEDIATION PROGRAM.
